exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your personal finance mastery forward
items: Gather and organize all your financial statements from the past 3 months
Calculate your exact net worth by listing all assets and debts with current values
Research and compare 3 high-yield savings accounts to find the best interest rate for your emergency fund
Complete a comprehensive credit report review from all three bureaus (Experian, Equifax, TransUnion)
Create a detailed tracking system for all monthly expenses by category for the next 30 days
Set up automatic transfers to move a fixed amount from checking to savings on your payday
